name: Prairie Operating Co.
business: Prairie Operating Co. is an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition and development of crude oil, natural gas, and NGLs. Our assets and operations are strategically located in the oil region of rural Weld County, Colorado, within the Denver Julesburg Basin.
sellsTo: purchasers of crude oil, natural gas, and NGLs

exposures.sentence: We are an independent oil and natural gas company focused on the acquisition and development of crude oil, natural gas, and NGLs.

catalysts.event: Completion of Blehm North and Schneider DSU wells
catalysts.sentence: These ten wells are expected to be completed in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of Elder East and West DSU development
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we began drilling a nine well development in our Elder East and West DSUs, which is expected to be completed in the early in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Drill and complete approximately 40 gross wells in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, we plan to drill and complete approximately 40 gross wells in 2026 with further development planned in 2027.
